name: J1939TestJoinPGEvent
title: J1939TestJoinPGEvent
syntax: long J1939TestJoinPGEvent( dword sourceAddr, dword destAddr, dword pgn, )
description: Completes the current set of "joined events" with the transmitted event. This function does not wait.

parameters.name: sourceAddr
parameters.description: source address of the PG or Null address (0xFE) for wildcard
